paper_title: Chinese SimpleQA: A Chinese Factuality Evaluation for Large Language Models
evaluation_method: LLM-as-judge (GPT-4o recommended). Grades each response into 3 categories: Correct (CO), Not Attempted (NA), Incorrect (IN). Derived metrics: Correct Given Attempted (CGA) = CO/(CO+IN), F-score = harmonic mean of CO and CGA.
